substep.title: Invoke await_pr_review Tool

check.action: Exit pr-cycle with TIMEOUT report (see step 9).
Exit pr-cycle with ERROR report (see step 9).

substep.title: Interpret Collected Data
substep.action:
Decision tree on the returned `unresolved_threads`, `reviews`, `issue_comments` arrays:
- IF unresolved_threads.length > 0: Proceed to step 4 (assess each thread).
- ELSE IF reviews.length > 0 AND latest review state == 'approved': Proceed to step 9 (escalate to human for merge).
- ELSE IF reviews.length > 0 (reviewed but no approve state): Proceed to step 9 (reviewed, no threads, ready for human).
- ELSE IF issue_comments.length > 0: Read the comment content: - If it says "reviewing" or "will post feedback": Re-invoke await_pr_review (Gemini is still processing). - If it indicates satisfaction ("addressed", "looks good"): Proceed to step 9. - If ambiguous: Re-invoke await_pr_review (wait for more signal).
- ELSE: This shouldn't happen with activity_detected status. Log a warning and re-invoke await_pr_review.
